# Study Design and Metadata

::: {.cdi-message}
Define the biological question, sample groups, metadata fields, and analysis-ready study structure.
:::

## Learning goal

By the end of this lesson, the learner should understand how this stage supports the complete Microbiome System.

## Why this matters

This section will explain the role of Study Design and Metadata in the end-to-end microbiome workflow.

## Practical workflow



## Takeaway

Microbiome analysis is strongest when each technical step is connected back to the study question, metadata, interpretation, and reproducible reporting.
